author: benbenbang

commands.description: Shorten a URL using your preferred service
commands.name: shorten-url
commands.subtitle: Shorten URLs
commands.title: Shorten URL

description: Shorten URLs using multiple services (bit.ly, cutt.ly, tinyurl, is.gd, v.gd)
name: raycast-clip

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the `prepublishOnly` script and rerun `npm publish` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use `npm run publish` instead.

" && exit 1

title: Clip - URL Shortener
